headline: P&L exposure: ₹30,000 Cr potential upside (engine estimate); no direct revenue or margin at risk
what_matters: No supply chain transmission; investment is direct operational capex, not a supply chain event.
No immediate P/E compression or margin erosion; long-term potential for premium valuation if ESG ratings improve.
Potential to lower cost of capital by 20-40bps if EU Taxonomy alignment and BRSR/GRI disclosures are robust; otherwise, risk of bond spread widening if disclosure lags.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹30,000 Cr potential upside (engine estimate); no direct revenue or margin at risk
